entry.title: The Next Best Thing
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 854Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: “Buck.”“Hmm?” Buck hadn’t even seen or heard Eddie descending the stairs until he’s next to him.“Look.”Buck narrows his eyes. “At?” That’s when he sees it—really sees it. The physical resemblance. The wiry caramel hair, the light blue eyes, the gentle arch of his nose, and the full set of lips. He’s even got what looks like an old scar above his left eyebrow.

entry.title: S6 Superwoman: Last Responder
entry.summary:
Author: That_bitch_without_a_life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,663Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 20

Summary: For the past few months everything has been hectic and a little off balance. For some reason Bobby keeps putting her in different shift groups. It’s nice to be working with Ravi again now that he’s finished his probation and moved back to B-shift, but something is clearly up. With the return of the rest of the 118 things are starting to look up for Kara, but more importantly, new opportunity. TLDR: this is a female buck fic if she was supergirl, just trust the process.

entry.title: The Talk of the Town
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,142Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Eddie tosses the wipe and the wrapping on the floor in one swift move, then, removing the paper backing from the bandaid, places it over his cut. “There. All better.”“What? No kiss?”Buck freezes. Why the fuck would he say that?Eddie’s lips part and he leans back just slightly. Enough for Buck to notice and make him want to drive out to the nearest desert for the vultures to have their way with him.

entry.title: To the furthest star in the sky
entry.summary:
Author: Naterboo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,266Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: “Dada?” she asks in a small voice, and he puts down his toast, turning his attention to her fully. “What’s up, Nova bug?” he asks, and she wrings her hands in her NASA T-shirt. He reaches out for her hands and holds them. “Are you still gonna do my hair when the baby is here?” she asks, and he smiles softly at her. “Everyday you ask me to,” he says in answer, rubbing his thumbs over the tops of her hands. “Even if it’s the middle of the night and you just want your hair plaited before bed.” She looks up at him with teary eyes and he melts a little. “Are you gonna still love me when she’s borned?” He brings their hands up to her face so he can cup her warm cheeks between his hands. “Of course, Nova Star. Do you remember how much I love you?” he asks, and when she nods, he gives her a soft smile, and they recite it together. “From the deepest part of the ocean—to the furthest star in the sky, I love you, Nova Star.”Or, the one in which the Buck navigates parenthood with one preparing to fly the nest, the other being a terror and one on the way.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Guesses Baby Diaz's Gender! 🤍
entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,410Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: "Wait, I change my mind! The babies are boys. Buck hasn't been sick!" Chimney said. From behind the camera, May rolled her eyes as she sighed heavily. "Chimney, you can't keep changing your mind. You pick one final option, and that's it. Or it's Buck's gender reveal for his twins and everyone is still trying to decide what the gender is. Only three people know about their gender. Take a guess as to who those three are. ##KnockBuckUp2026 Prompt 3&4: Girlsdad Buddie and Twins 🤍

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,377Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 156

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: bullseye
entry.summary:
Author: nineinchdove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,802Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: “He squished his tit.” Eddie gives her a bewildered look.  “What? He did. They’re bothering him.” “Are you trying to tell me that Buck’s tits are bugging him?” “Yes,” Hen's completely serious. “Listen, that is a squish of annoyance.” Eddie looks down at his chest with a frown. “Is there some unspoken language between big chested people that I don’t know about?” “Yes."DAY TWO: Girls dads + Twin pregnancy

entry.title: give you my wild, give you a child
entry.summary:
Author: diazkissed

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,412Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 71

Summary: It must’ve rode up after he pointed the whisk, and up until now, Eddie hadn’t even realized Buck wasn’t wearing an apron — which was definitely weird. Buck always wore one as he baked or cooked. Eddie had to force his gaze away from the tiny, yet very evident round appearance of his boyfriend’s stomach. Buck returned to his glaze making, oblivious to Eddie’s stares, which Eddie continued on doing, completely baffled. With a recoil from him mentally slapping himself, Eddie forced his brain to quit overthinking — he was being cruel, right? Buck had been struggling with weight, who was Eddie to deliberately notice it in a way that felt…presumptuous. There was nothing Eddie could do but shake the thoughts out of his head and return to the stubborn bills awaiting him. Buck had been steady — fighting back the rewrites his brain and body seemed to permit. Sure, it had been challenging to keep track of the cravings, mood swings, and the physical changes Buck swore was happening— “Oh shit,” Eddie verbally said, face dropping. Buck was pregnant.OR: After a few challenging days, Eddie realizes something about Buck, and unfortunately, doesn't have the heart to tell him.

entry.title: eddie diaz's 15 step guide to scoring a husband
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,002Chapters: 3/15Kudos: 22

Summary: He laid back down, staring up at the ceiling again. When he couldn’t fall asleep, he usually tried some 4-7-8 counting method that he learned ages ago. It often did the trick in a matter of minutes, 15 at most.This was not one of those nights.No matter what he did, how much he tossed and turned, he couldn’t stop his brain from thinking and overanalyzing.What did they mean by that? ‘Just made sense,’ we don’t do everything together, we’re not—Eddie shot up mid-thought.“Oh. Oh god,” he said to no one. ... some old family book inspires eddie to make a guide for getting his man.

entry.title: Bother Me Anytime (no really, anytime)
entry.summary:
Author: applepiegirl123

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,434Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 23

Summary: There’s a loud *snap* from above him. Shouting follows—voices overlapping, urgent, wrong. Eddie doesn’t have time to figure out why before his rope jerks violently, slack disappearing in an instant. Then he’s falling—down, down, down. --- “Eddie.” Someone’s voice cuts through the noise. Bright. Too bright. His head spins, thoughts slipping through his fingers before he can catch them. He tries to push himself up—ignoring the sharp sting that lances through his ribs—but the second he moves, hands press him gently back down, firm and unyielding. *Rude,* he thinks vaguely. He doesn’t get the chance to argue. Everything goes black.   Or: Eddie gets a week off work for minor injuries and texts Buck constantly because he's lonely and apparently (as he'll soon find out) gay asf

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

  • Eventual Smut

  • Bobby Nash Lives
  • No Beta We Die Like Bobby Nash

entry.title: Starting Anew (Will you be there too?)
entry.summary:
Author: Begen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,414Chapters: 24/30Kudos: 567

Summary: Ever since losing his team and leaving the Seals, Buck has been alone, haunted by his past. His arrival at the 118 provides him a chance to move forward, but his past is never too far behind.
